citations.narrative:
The facility has excessive chew damage around 5 entrances of the outdoor runs that house 17 adult dogs. There are also
3 enclosures that have excessive chew damage around the entrance of the whelping boxes that house 3 adult dogs and 6
puppies. Chew damage does not allow for proper sanitization, can lead to an increased risk of disease in the dogs and
can create sharp points in the damaged areas. Correct by ensuring that all surfaces are maintained including houses,
dens, and other furniture-type fixtures and objects within the facility that cannot be readily cleaned and sanitized are
replaced when worn or soiled. Correct by, 20-April-2026.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with a Facility Representative.
n

narrative:
3.1(c)(1) 
   
Housing facilities, general. 
The facility has excessive chew damage around 5 entrances of the outdoor runs that house 17 adult dogs. There are also 
3 enclosures that have excessive chew damage around the entrance of the whelping boxes that house 3 adult dogs and 6 
puppies. Chew damage does not allow for proper sanitization, can lead to an increased risk of disease in the dogs and 
can create sharp points in the damaged areas. Correct by ensuring that all surfaces are maintained including houses, 
dens, and other furniture-type fixtures and objects within the facility that cannot be readily cleaned and sanitized are 
replaced when worn or soiled. Correct by, 20-April-2026. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with a Facility Representative.
